winner_self_expected: PasswordPolicy::isStrong returns true for password length >= 12
PasswordPolicy::isStrong returns false for password length < 12

result.winner_first_500:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Core;

final class PasswordPolicy
{
    public static function isStrong(string $password): bool
    {
        return strlen($password) >= 12;
    }
}
